dsl_rule.translation_notes: BARR pattern entry mapped to: price above SMA_20 (upsloping base), volume spike above historical vol, and price breaking above upper Bollinger Band (bump phase with momentum). Exit on price crossing below SMA_20 (sharp decline phase). Pattern requires visual confirmation of rounding top which cannot be fully expressed in quantitative rules; additional chart review recommended. Success rates and specific percentage moves marked AUTHOR_SILENT were not incorporated.

source_rule_text: Pattern name: BARR (Bump And Run Reversal). Prices rise with upward sloping base, bump up with volume spike on momentum, round over at top, then decline sharply.
